card.headline: OS_pianoseq/OS_balloonsAR: persistent failure
reasons: OS_pianoseq and OS_balloonsAR stay at zero performance even at minimum difficulty—patient can't do them; pause/swap now.

items.text: OS_pianoseq and OS_balloonsAR stay at zero performance even at minimum difficulty—patient can't do them; pause/swap now.

checkin.wins: Wednesday you stacked sessions and kept your rhythm. Shopping and Memory stayed steady, and FitIn looked sharp.
checkin.to_improve: If Whacamole AR felt choppy lately, start with a slower round and focus on clean hits.
